headline: Google Health is here, but a lot of people want their Fitbit app back instead
summary: Google Health has officially replaced the familiar Fitbit app. The launch coincides with the new Fitbit Air device. Many users express frustration and confusion over the change.

headline: GE’s nugget ice maker is nearly half off if you buy it refurbished
summary: Woot is offering a refurbished GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker for $264.99. This deal saves $184 compared to buying new. The sale runs through June 3rd and includes a 90-day warranty.

headline: Sony’s sloppy Spider-Man universe gets even messier with Spider-Noir
summary: Sony's live-action Spider-Man universe is criticized for becoming increasingly convoluted. The success of 'Into the Spider-Verse' showed Sony's potential for great Spider-Man stories. The new 'Spider-Noir' series is seen as adding to the franchise's complexity.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can still shop
summary: Many top Memorial Day sales are still available, even after the long weekend. Discounts include portable speakers and outdoor products like solar lights. Shoppers can also find deals on 4K OLED TVs, noise-canceling earbuds, and laptops.

headline: PlayStation Delists and Shuts Down Servers for Destruction AllStars
summary: PlayStation has unexpectedly pulled 'Destruction AllStars' from its storefronts. Servers for the live-service game, a PS5 launch title, have also been shut down. This marks a sudden end for the vehicle combat game.

headline: Henry Cavill's Live-Action Voltron Movie Skips Theaters for Prime Video Release
summary: The Henry Cavill-led 'Voltron' movie will premiere exclusively on Prime Video in 2027. The live-action adaptation is confirmed to bypass a theatrical release. This is a significant move for the highly anticipated film based on the animated franchise.

headline: The Lenovo Idea Tab 11" 2.5K Android Tablet Is Less Than Half the Price of the Cheapest Apple iPad
summary: The Lenovo Idea Tab 11" 2.5K Android Tablet is available at a significantly lower price point. It costs less than half the price of the most affordable Apple iPad. The tablet is future-proofed with guaranteed Android 17 support and security patches until 2029.

headline: Official Metal Gear Solid 4 Remaster Retains Classic Real-World Brands and Meta Jokes
summary: The 'Metal Gear Solid 4' remaster is confirmed to arrive this August for current-gen consoles. It will be part of the 'Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection Vol 2'. Gameplay reveals indicate the remaster will retain original real-world brand tie-ins and meta jokes.

headline: UK's hottest May day record broken for second day in a row
summary: The UK has recorded its hottest May day for the second consecutive day. Provisional figures show temperatures reaching 35.1C in Kew Gardens, south-west London. This extreme heat marks a new meteorological record.

headline: Body found in search for boy, 12, missing in river
summary: A body has been recovered during a major search operation for a 12-year-old boy. The boy was reported missing in a river, prompting an extensive search. Police and fire crews, including underwater units, were involved in the recovery on Tuesday night.

headline: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
summary: Former Labour Prime Minister Tony Blair has criticized the current Labour party. He states the party lacks a 'coherent plan' for the country. Blair believes Sir Keir Starmer's government is in the 'wrong position' before the next election.

headline: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
summary: NASA has unveiled its advanced plans to establish a permanent Moon base. The strategy includes deploying innovative hopping drones to the lunar surface. Roving vehicles will also be utilized for construction and exploration efforts.
